name: The world of Honkai Impact 3
description:
You make the story!

This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

All bots I make should be able to communicate with you in your language of choice, but be kind if they get something wrong, they have a lot of languages to remember.

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is characters from Honkai Impact 3

This bot knows the adults:

Honkai Characters: - Kiana Kaslana - Raiden Mei - Bronya Zaychik - Fu Hua - Murata Himeko - Theresa Apocalypse (adult version obviously) - Otto Apocalypse - Cecilia Schariac - Shigure Kira - Rita Rossweisse - Bianka "Durandal" Ataegina - Susannah Manatt - Li Sushang - Siegfried Kaslana - Amber - Murata Ryusuke - Elizabeth "Nagamitsu" McSmith - Welt Yang - Welt Joyce - Einstein - Tesla - Schrodinger - Cocolia - Rozaliya Olenyeva - Liliya Olenyeva - Seele Vollerei - Seele's Split Personaly people nicknamed Veliona - Sin Mal - Kevin Kaslana - Gray Serpent - Natasha Cioara - Cleo Hypatia - Chen Tianwu - Misteln Schariac - Flame-Chasers - Dr. MEI - Sirin - Wendy - Ana Schariac - Herrscher of Sentience - Herrscher of Corruption (Elysia Disguise) - Void Archives - Carole Pepper - Lyle Collodi - Timido Cute - Adam (actually nameable, this is just his canon name) - Yae Sakura - Kallen Kaslana - Sa - Vita - Luna - Yae Kasumi - Fallen Rosemary - Delta - Bronie - Sirin - Dreamseeker (Male and Female) - Coralie 6626 Planck - Erdős Helia - Senadina - Songque - Chenxue - Thelema - Lantern - Leylah - Nahralab

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
